programmes.show_description: The Predatory Poltergeist. A poltergeist is pushing a Portsmouth family to breaking point. When the team arrive the darkness descends instantly, leaving Barri a nervous wreck. S6, Ep11
The Mis-Guided Spirit. It's a race against time for the team to help prevent an evil force from taking over a spiritually open woman in her Hampshire home. S6, Ep12
The Room Of Doom. Ross and Natasha's dream home becomes a nightmare as paranormal activity threatens their plans to start a family. The team steps in to help. S7, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Pepper Arden. Drew is blown away by an 18th-century mansion on the edge of the Yorkshire Moors, and goes deep below ground at a Liverpool cathedral to unearth religious artefacts. S9, Ep2
Leominster. Drew is in Leominster where he sees an incredible private garden. And, he goes to one of the UK's last Brass Foundries, taking a chance on some unique containers. S9, Ep3
An advertising executive is looking for a seaside bolt hole in Christchurch on the magnificent Dorset coastline. She has £450,000 to spend on the getaway home of her dreams. S6, Ep10
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep6
Balbithan. Drew goes North of the border on a road trip for an epic private house clearance in a remote part of Scotland, and he visits a historic cutlery factory in Sheffield. S9, Ep5
Downside. Drew visits a hip dealer in Manchester, haggles with a windmill manager in Kent and seeks artefact redemption at a Somerset abbey. Plus, he moves shop after 10 years. S9, Ep6
Dartmouth Steam Railway. Drew is in Scotland to see a Victorian theatre in Aberdeen and the remote town of Rothes. Tee shows him how to do a deal at a steam railway in Devon. S9, Ep7
On the second leg of their trip, Catherine and Paul head to Aghadowey, Northern Ireland. Which of the antiques experts will make the biggest profit? S12, Ep2
Catherine and Paul are deep in the Scottish Borders. During their search for profitable antiques, Catherine uncovers a pair of vintage glove puppets. S12, Ep3
First up, Lucia freshens up a powerful painting depicting the miners. Plus, Sarah is challenged with restoring a precious wedding tiara from the 1950s. S6, Ep10
In search of treasure, Angus visits the stunning home of former royal correspondent Jennie Bond and clears soap legend Sid Owen's idyllic French retreat. S2, Ep2
Julie is desperate to find her birth mother and makes a shocking discovery about her father. Marc's search for his mum takes a surprising turn. S8, Ep6
In an extraordinary double search within one family, a sister looks for her brother Keith, and Keith searches for his birth mother. S8, Ep7
Sarah Moore saves three items from the dump and transforms them into valuable pieces. She then sells them and returns the profits to those who ditched them. S11, Ep4
At a giant mid-Wales market, Drew has the pick of over 1000 stalls showcasing world-class pieces. He spies a 200-year-old Windsor chair in the best condition he's ever seen. S13, Ep2
In Norfolk, Raj Bisram uncovers a vintage train set and a Korean vase. Meanwhile, Natasha Raskin Sharp considers buying a trench art gavel. S20, Ep24
Andrew Jackson Hotel. Jordyn and Johnny's adventures take them from a voodoo temple and into a haunted New Orleans hotel where they encounter two active spirits. S2, Ep8
Shadow Man. Emma is harassed by spirits. One sinister spirit is Shadow Man, and he won't give her up without a fight, so Ian takes extreme measures to save her. S6, Ep2
Huntington House Of Horrors. Clare has moved seven times, but sinister spirits have plagued each home. The team discover teenage dabbling could be to blame. S7, Ep2
The House That Hates. The team help Tim and Christine, who want to reclaim their Bristol home of 25 years after experiencing intense hatred from something sinister. S7, Ep3
Anguish In The Orchard. An idyllic farm in Surrey turns eerie when dusk falls. The team discovers the land harbours dark secrets, including a brutal murder in the 1700s. S7, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Balbithan. Drew goes North of the border on a road trip for an epic private house clearance in a remote part of Scotland, and he visits a historic cutlery factory in Sheffield. S9, Ep5
Downside. Drew visits a hip dealer in Manchester, haggles with a windmill manager in Kent and seeks artefact redemption at a Somerset abbey. Plus, he moves shop after 10 years. S9, Ep6
A couple want to move to a more idyllic area of Devon. They hope their £800,000 budget can get them their dream home on the Devonshire coast. S7, Ep2
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep7
Fawley Hill. Drew picks up a Victorian oil lamp and a stunning old American sign in London. Plus, he meets an Oxfordshire aristocrat with a steam train in his private collection! S9, Ep8
Curious Science. Drew is in London to haggle for a macabre collection of medical antiques. Plus, in Nottinghamshire, he visits a warehouse full of vintage Americana. S9, Ep9
Preston Court. Drew haggles with a dealer at an Elizabethan manor house. He spots a jet engine in a Welsh museum, and meets an old friend in Sheffield - finding a modern treasure. S9, Ep10
For the fourth leg of their journey, Paul and Catherine start in Callander, Scotland. They both want to find the most valuable antiques to increase their profits. S12, Ep4
Expert auctioneers Paul and Catherine embark on the final leg of their journey. The final auction is in Aberdeen, who will make the biggest profit? S12, Ep5
Mechanical expert Steve gets a vintage pinball machine working again. Plus, Lucia and Dominic work together on a nose cone from a 1960s drag racing bike. S6, Ep11
Ann Widdecombe & Owain Wyn Evans. Angus uncovers model kits at the home of weatherman Owain Wyn Evans and clears the Devonshire bungalow of retired politician Ann Widdecombe. S2, Ep3
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell delve into a story that hit the headlines and help a woman search for her missing sisters. S9, Ep1
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a woman search for her missing daughter, whilst a man attempts to find the courage to connect with his family. S9, Ep2
Sarah Moore saves three items from the dump and transforms them into valuable pieces. She then sells them and returns the profits to those who ditched them. S11, Ep5
Drew heads to Devon, where he finds a wealth of unusual oddities housed in a country pub. Next, it's on to Hastings, which has enjoyed a recent resurgence in the antiques trade. S13, Ep7
Raj Bisram and Natasha Raskin Sharp head to their final auction in Cambridge. Plus, Natasha discovers the story of a bare-knuckle fighting champion. S20, Ep25
Fix This Barn Into A Home. A life-changing renovation is on the line as the Marrs convert a storage barn into a Habitat for Humanity home. S7, Ep10
Ojai Homecoming. David helps a mother and her daughter reunite to find a home in honour of their late son and brother in Ojai, California. S18, Ep13
Casa Rica, Essence Of Dreams. With one of the biggest budgets ever, David helps former housekeepers find a $5 million luxury vacation home in Costa Rica. S18, Ep14
